# Upstream Source: ui-styling

Original upstream folder:

`https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/tree/main/.claude/skills/ui-styling`

Expected local source path when the upstream submodule is available:

`external/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/.claude/skills/ui-styling`

## Purpose

Supplemental UI styling guidance for visual finish, typography, canvas/font references, implementation scripts, and styling references used by the upstream UI/UX Pro Max ecosystem.

## Terranex usage

Consult through `.ai/skills/terranex-ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md` when evaluating visual polish, spacing, hierarchy, typography, and component presentation. Terranex-specific financial operating system constraints take precedence.

## Runtime boundary

This folder is reference material only. Do not import it into React runtime code or package it into the app bundle.
